top_signals.title: Microsoft’s Sliding Stock, AI Woes Make It Market’s Biggest Drag
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 Index has had a fitful 2026 as it aims for a fourth-straight year of double-digit percentage gains, something it hasn’t done since the 1990s, while contending with risks from the war in Iran and rising inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Intuit plans to cut workforce by about 17% as tax software maker reckons with slowing growth
top_signals.summary: Intuit's stock has been hammered this year as investors worry that generative artificial intelligence models could threaten software companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Walmart to report first-quarter earnings before the bell. Here's what Wall Street expects
top_signals.summary: Walmart's fiscal first-quarter earnings report will offer Wall Street a unique view into the health of the U.S. economy

top_signals.title: Tochigi robbery-murder suspect tried to flee to South Korea
top_signals.summary: The 28-year-old alleged instructor of the crime was taken into custody shortly before his planned flight to Seoul at Tokyo's Haneda Airport in the early hours of Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
